text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, I'm heading to my office early to
finish up some leftover work from the day before.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Are you still alive?! There's no gaping
hole in your stomach, right?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Th-thank goodness! So that terrible sight was
all just a dream, then?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You weren't brainwashed by an evil
organization?! And you didn't get torn to pieces
shielding me from that enemy attack after all?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I find myself spending the early morning
hours trying to console Kawakami Princess as she
bawls her eyes out.
